title: CVE-2026-13708: Imager::File::JPEG Heap Memory Leak
summary: [P2] A heap memory leak in Imager::File::JPEG versions before 1.003 for Perl can be exploited, but no patches are available. The vulnerability has not been exploited in the wild yet. Why now: Newly disclosed vulnerability with potential for exploitation. (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: Heap memory leak in a Perl library.

title: CVE-2026-13698: OpenVPN Memory Leak
summary: [P1] A memory leak in OpenVPN versions 2.5.0 through 2.5.11, 2.6.0 through 2.6.20 can be exploited, but no patches are available. The vulnerability has not been exploited in the wild yet. Why now: Newly disclosed vulnerability with potential for exploitation in widely used VPN software. (confidence: 0.90)
classification_reasoning: Memory leak in a widely used VPN software.
